title: Create money
description:
RP money that is fitting for the Create mod. 
Used in 90gqCreate modpack
body:
# Money
This mod adds 5 different types of coins, representing different values. Each type of coin can be crafted either via combining 5 coins of the tier below it or by simply putting 1 coin of the higher tier into the crafting grid. This makes for an easy exchange process.

# Roleplay
This mod is designed to function well with roleplay servers. In big modpacks, items often become extremely common and it's hard to settle on a currency. The coins are therefore unobtainable in survival, but can however be found in the creative menu or via commands for the operators of the server to distribute as they please. If you would like to be able to obtain the coins in survival you can do this by creating a custom [data pack](<https://minecraft.wiki/w/Data_pack>) or by using [CraftTweaker](<https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crafttweaker>).

# Create
This mod was originally commissioned for the modpack [90gq Create](<https://modrinth.com/modpack/90gqcreate2>). Feel free to check it out!

# Looking for a server?
